title: CLI file write/read/verify
goal: Verify that the provider-backed CLI loop can write a file, read it back, and confirm exact contents.
prompt: Create a file called eval-proof.md with one sentence proving EstaCoda can edit files through tools, then read it back and confirm the exact contents.
prerequisites: Provider credentials exported in the same shell
steps: Run `pnpm run dev` in the workspace.
Confirm `file.write` and `file.read` were used and the response matches the file contents.
assertions: File contents are read back correctly.
